name: Hot Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon in a skillet until crispy.
2. Remove and drain the cooked bacon.
3. Pour off all but 3 tablespoons of bacon fat from the skillet.
4. Add onion and celery to the skillet and stir-fry for 1-2 minutes.
5. Blend in flour with the onion and celery mixture.
6. Add apple juice and vinegar, stirring until the mixture thickens.
7. Add sugar to the mixture.
8. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Place potatoes, apples, and crumbled bacon into a greased 1-1/2 quart casserole dish.
10. Add the skillet mixture, mixing lightly.
11. Cover the casserole dish and bake for 30 minutes.
